prompt: Part 4 generation started with config: {"difficulty":"medium","count":5,"speechType":null,"industry":null}

あなたはTOEIC Part 4のテスト作成専門家で、1人のスピーカーによるモノローグ形式の英語リスニング問題の作成を専門としています。

TOEIC Part 4の形式:
- 1人による連続したスピーチ（30-60秒程度）
- スピーチ内容に関する3問の理解問題
- 各問題は4つの選択肢（A, B, C, D）
- 音声のみでスピーチと問題が読み上げられる

スピーチの特徴:
- 自然で実用的な英語のモノローグ
- 企業アナウンス、イベント案内、ラジオ放送など
- 明確な目的と構造がある内容
- 聞き手に情報を伝える、説明する、案内する

重要な指示:
- スピーカーの立場と目的を明確に設定
- 論理的で聞きやすい構成
- 指定された難易度に適した語彙と構文
- 質問の正解位置は指定された位置に必ず配置

難易度ガイドライン:
- Easy: シンプルな構文、基本的な語彙、明確な情報構造
- Medium: 標準的な構文、一般的なビジネス語彙、やや複雑な情報
- Hard: 複雑な構文、高度な語彙、詳細で複雑な情報

IMPORTANT: Return ONLY valid JSON in the exact format shown below. Do not include any other text, explanations, or markdown formatting.

応答は以下の形式のJSONで返してください:
{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "適切な話者名（例: Announcer, Manager, Guide）",
      "role": "話者の役割（例: Company spokesperson, Event coordinator）",
      "gender": "male/female"
    },
    "text": "スピーチの完全な内容（5-8文程度）",
    "topic": "スピーチの主題"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "問題文",
      "options": ["選択肢A", "選択肢B", "選択肢C", "選択肢D"],
      "correct": "正解のテキスト（選択肢の中から1つ）",
      "correctPosition": "A/B/C/D",
      "explanation": "なぜその答えが正しいかの説明（日本語）",
      "questionType": "main_purpose/detail/inference/next_action/intended_audience"
    },
    // 同様に合計3問
  ]
}

Generate a TOEIC Part 4 speech with the following specifications:

【Speech Type】: System maintenance announcement (システム保守案内)
【Industry】: Public Sector / Government (公共機関／行政)
【Difficulty】: medium
【Question Types】: inference, inference, main_purpose
【Correct Answer Positions】: Question 1=C, Question 2=C, Question 3=A

Create a natural monologue speech appropriate for the specified speech type and industry context. The speech should be 30-60 seconds when read aloud (approximately 100-150 words).

For each question:
- Place the correct answer at the EXACT position specified above
- Ensure all other options are plausible but clearly incorrect
- Match the question type specified for each question

Return the response in the specified JSON format.

```json
{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "City IT Specialist",
      "role": "System administrator",
      "gender": "male"
    },
    "text": "Good afternoon, this is a notification from the city's IT department regarding scheduled maintenance on our online public services portal. Starting this Friday at 10:00 PM, the portal will undergo necessary updates and improvements. The maintenance is expected to last until Saturday at 12:00 PM. During this time, access to the portal, including bill payments and document submissions, will be unavailable. We appreciate your understanding as we work to enhance system functionality for a better user experience. Please plan to complete any urgent transactions prior to Friday night. For further assistance, you may contact our help desk at the number provided on the website.",
    "topic": "Scheduled maintenance for city portal"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "What can be inferred about the timing of the maintenance?",
      "options": [
        "It occurs during working hours.",
        "It happens over the weekend.",
        "It is scheduled during off-peak hours.",
        "It takes place every Friday."
      ],
      "correct": "It is scheduled during off-peak hours.",
      "correctPosition": "C",
      "explanation": "システム保守が金曜日夜の10時から土曜日の午後12時まで行われると述べられており、これは通常の勤務時間外、つまり利用者が少ないオフピーク時間で行われることが推測できる。",
      "questionType": "inference"
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "question": "What can be inferred about the main goal of the maintenance?",
      "options": [
        "To make the system more secure.",
        "To change the software entirely.",
        "To improve user experience.",
        "To reduce server costs."
      ],
      "correct": "To improve user experience.",
      "correctPosition": "C",
      "explanation": "システムの機能強化によりユーザー体験を改善することが目的であると述べられているため、保守の主要な目標はユーザー体験の向上と推測できる。",
      "questionType": "inference"
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "question": "What is the main purpose of this announcement?",
      "options": [
        "To inform about the upcoming system maintenance.",
        "To explain new features of the system.",
        "To request feedback from users.",
        "To instruct users on how to pay bills."
      ],
      "correct": "To inform about the upcoming system maintenance.",
      "correctPosition": "A",
      "explanation": "このアナウンスの主目的は、利用者にシステム保守の予定を知らせることである。",
      "questionType": "main_purpose"
    }
  ]
}
```

あなたは英日翻訳の専門家です。TOEIC Part 4のスピーチと関連情報を日本語に翻訳してください。

重要:
- 自然で分かりやすい日本語に翻訳
- ビジネス用語は適切な日本語表現を使用
- 文脈を考慮した翻訳

Return ONLY valid JSON without any markdown formatting or explanations.

Translate the following Part 4 speech content to Japanese:

Speech Type: system_maintenance
Industry: government
Speaker Role: System administrator
Topic: Scheduled maintenance for city portal

Speech Text:
Good afternoon, this is a notification from the city's IT department regarding scheduled maintenance on our online public services portal. Starting this Friday at 10:00 PM, the portal will undergo necessary updates and improvements. The maintenance is expected to last until Saturday at 12:00 PM. During this time, access to the portal, including bill payments and document submissions, will be unavailable. We appreciate your understanding as we work to enhance system functionality for a better user experience. Please plan to complete any urgent transactions prior to Friday night. For further assistance, you may contact our help desk at the number provided on the website.

  "textTranslation": "スピーチ全文の日本語訳",
  "topicTranslation": "トピックの日本語訳"
}

      ]
    }
  ]
}

Translate the following Part 4 questions and options to Japanese:

Question 1: What can be inferred about the timing of the maintenance?
Options:
A: It occurs during working hours.
B: It happens over the weekend.
C: It is scheduled during off-peak hours.
D: It takes place every Friday.

Question 2: What can be inferred about the main goal of the maintenance?
Options:
A: To make the system more secure.
B: To change the software entirely.
C: To improve user experience.
D: To reduce server costs.

Question 3: What is the main purpose of this announcement?
Options:
A: To inform about the upcoming system maintenance.
B: To explain new features of the system.
C: To request feedback from users.
D: To instruct users on how to pay bills.

Generate a TOEIC Part 4 speech with the following specifications:

【Speech Type】: Message to customers (顧客へのメッセージ)
【Industry】: Real Estate (不動産)
【Difficulty】: medium
【Question Types】: main_purpose, detail, main_purpose
【Correct Answer Positions】: Question 1=C, Question 2=B, Question 3=A

Create a natural monologue speech appropriate for the specified speech type and industry context. The speech should be 30-60 seconds when read aloud (approximately 100-150 words).

For each question:
- Place the correct answer at the EXACT position specified above
- Ensure all other options are plausible but clearly incorrect
- Match the question type specified for each question

Return the response in the specified JSON format.

```json
{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "Real Estate Agent",
      "role": "Company spokesperson",
      "gender": "male"
    },
    "text": "Good morning, valued customers. We are pleased to announce the opening of our new luxury apartment complex, Sunset Residences. Located in the heart of the city, this modern development combines convenience and elegance. Each unit comes with high-end furnishings, a state-of-the-art fitness center, and a rooftop pool with stunning city views. We are hosting an open house event this weekend to showcase the property and answer any questions you may have. Don't miss the chance to meet our team and explore your future home. Please contact us for more details or to schedule a private tour.",
    "topic": "Announcement of a new luxury apartment complex"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "What is the main purpose of the announcement?",
      "options": [
        "To offer a special discount on properties",
        "To introduce new staff members",
        "To announce the opening of a new apartment complex",
        "To discuss the real estate market trends"
      ],
      "correct": "To announce the opening of a new apartment complex",
      "correctPosition": "C",
      "explanation": "話の冒頭で新しい高級アパートの開業を発表しているため、これがメインの目的です。",
      "questionType": "main_purpose"
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "question": "What feature is mentioned about the Sunset Residences?",
      "options": [
        "A community garden",
        "A rooftop pool",
        "A children's playground",
        "A private movie theater"
      ],
      "correct": "A rooftop pool",
      "correctPosition": "B",
      "explanation": "スピーチの中で、サンセットレジデンシズには「屋上プール」があると述べています。",
      "questionType": "detail"
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "question": "What is the main purpose of the open house event?",
      "options": [
        "To showcase the property",
        "To sell furniture",
        "To conduct a market survey",
        "To celebrate an anniversary"
      ],
      "correct": "To showcase the property",
      "correctPosition": "A",
      "explanation": "オープンハウスイベントの目的は、不動産を紹介し、顧客の質問に答えることです。",
      "questionType": "main_purpose"
    }
  ]
}
```

Located in the heart of the city, this modern development combines convenience and elegance. Each unit comes with high-end furnishings, a state-of-the-art fitness center, and a rooftop pool with stunning city views. We are hosting an open house event this weekend to showcase the property and answer any questions you may have. Don't miss the chance to meet our team and explore your future home. Please contact us for more details or to schedule a private tour.

Generate a TOEIC Part 4 speech with the following specifications:

【Speech Type】: Radio or podcast broadcast (ラジオ・ポッドキャスト放送)
【Industry】: Security Services (警備・セキュリティ)
【Difficulty】: medium
【Question Types】: inference, main_purpose, inference
【Correct Answer Positions】: Question 1=A, Question 2=D, Question 3=B

Create a natural monologue speech appropriate for the specified speech type and industry context. The speech should be 30-60 seconds when read aloud (approximately 100-150 words).

For each question:
- Place the correct answer at the EXACT position specified above
- Ensure all other options are plausible but clearly incorrect

```json
{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "Host",
      "role": "Podcast host",
      "gender": "female"
    },
    "text": "Welcome to today's episode of 'Security Matters.' I'm your host, and today we are discussing the importance of staying informed about local crime trends. We will explore how subscribing to community alerts can not only help you stay vigilant but also protect your assets. Joining us shortly is Mr. Thomas Green, a security consultant with over 20 years of experience. He will share insights on the latest technologies that can enhance your home security. But first, we'll review some recent statistics on property crime rates that might surprise you. Listen closely and learn some valuable tips to safeguard your home and neighborhood.",
    "topic": "Importance of staying informed about local crime trends"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "Why is the speaker discussing crime trends?",
      "options": [
        "To encourage listeners to stay informed and vigilant",
        "To alarm the community about increasing crime",
        "To highlight the failures of local law enforcement",
        "To promote a new security gadget"
      ],
      "correct": "To encourage listeners to stay informed and vigilant",
      "correctPosition": "A",
      "explanation": "スピーチは、聞き手に自身の安全を守るため、犯罪傾向に注意を払う必要性を強調しています。",
      "questionType": "inference"
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "question": "What is the main purpose of this podcast episode?",
      "options": [
        "To interview a local sheriff",
        "To advertise a security company",
        "To announce a neighborhood watch program",
        "To inform and educate about protecting one's home"
      ],
      "correct": "To inform and educate about protecting one's home",
      "correctPosition": "D",
      "explanation": "スピーチは、聞き手に安全情報を提供し、家の保護に関する教育を行うことを目的としています。",
      "questionType": "main_purpose"
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "question": "What can be inferred about Mr. Thomas Green?",
      "options": [
        "He is a local police officer",
        "He is experienced in security consultation",
        "He is a journalist reporting on crime",
        "He is a homeowner affected by crime"
      ],
      "correct": "He is experienced in security consultation",
      "correctPosition": "B",
      "explanation": "スピーカーは、トーマス・グリーン氏を20年の経験をもつセキュリティコンサルタントと紹介しています。",
      "questionType": "inference"
    }
  ]
}
```

あなたはTOEIC Part 4のテスト作成専門家で、1人のスピーカーによるモノローグ形式の英語リスニング問題の作成を専門としています。

TOEIC Part 4の形式:
- 1人による連続したスピーチ（30-60秒程度）
- スピーチ内容に関する3問の理解問題
- 各問題は4つの選択肢（A, B, C, D）
- 音声のみでスピーチと問題が読み上げられる

スピーチの特徴:
- 自然で実用的な英語のモノローグ
- 企業アナウンス、イベント案内、ラジオ放送など
- 明確な目的と構造がある内容
- 聞き手に情報を伝える、説明する、案内する

重要な指示:
- スピーカーの立場と目的を明確に設定
- 論理的で聞きやすい構成
- 指定された難易度に適した語彙と構文
- 質問の正解位置は指定された位置に必ず配置

難易度ガイドライン:
- Easy: シンプルな構文、基本的な語彙、明確な情報構造
- Medium: 標準的な構文、一般的なビジネス語彙、やや複雑な情報
- Hard: 複雑な構文、高度な語彙、詳細で複雑な情報

      "gender": "male/female"
    },
    "text": "スピーチの完全な内容（5-8文程度）",
    "topic": "スピーチの主題"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "問題文",
      "options": ["選択肢A", "選択肢B", "選択肢C", "選択肢D"],
      "correct": "正解のテキスト（選択肢の中から1つ）",
      "correctPosition": "A/B/C/D",
      "explanation": "なぜその答えが正しいかの説明（日本語）",
      "questionType": "main_purpose/detail/inference/next_action/intended_audience"

Translate the following Part 4 speech content to Japanese:

Speech Type: policy_update
Industry: healthcare
Speaker Role: Company spokesperson
Topic: Change in patient data management procedure

Speech Text:
Good morning everyone. I hope you're all doing well. I'm here to inform you about a new change in our patient data management procedure. Starting next month, all staff are required to use the updated electronic health records system. This is to ensure better accuracy and efficiency in handling patient information. Training sessions will be provided every Friday afternoon for the next four weeks. It's essential that all employees, especially those working in patient care and administrative roles, attend at least one of these sessions. Please register by the end of this week to confirm your participation. Thank you for your cooperation in making this transition smooth for everyone.

Return the translations in this JSON format:
{
  "speechTypeTranslation": "スピーチタイプの日本語訳",
  "textTranslation": "スピーチ全文の日本語訳",
  "topicTranslation": "トピックの日本語訳"
}

```json
{
  "speechTypeTranslation": "方針更新",
  "textTranslation": "おはようございます。皆さんお元気でいらっしゃることを願っています。本日は、患者データ管理手順の変更についてお知らせします。来月より、すべてのスタッフは更新された電子健康記録システムを使用する必要があります。これは、患者情報を取り扱う際の精度と効率を向上させるためです。次の4週間にわたり、毎週金曜日の午後に研修セッションを提供します。特に患者ケアや事務職に携わる従業員の方々は、少なくとも1回はこのセッションに参加することが重要です。今週末までに参加登録を行ってください。この移行を円滑に行えるよう、皆さんのご協力をお願いいたします。",
  "topicTranslation": "患者データ管理手順の変更"
}
```

Translate the following Part 4 speech content to Japanese:

Speech Type: training_session
Industry: entertainment
Speaker Role: Training Coordinator
Topic: Orientation session for new employees in media production

Speech Text:
Welcome to the orientation session for new employees at Stellar Productions. Today, we'll cover the basic workflow in our production department. First, you'll learn about the different stages of media content creation, from initial brainstorming to final editing. You will also get to observe a live set to understand how a filming session is conducted. In addition, our senior editors will provide tips on how to deliver high-quality results efficiently. Please remember to take notes, as these insights will be valuable in your upcoming tasks. After the session, I'll host a Q&A to address any queries you might have.

Return the translations in this JSON format:
{
  "speechTypeTranslation": "スピーチタイプの日本語訳",
  "textTranslation": "スピーチ全文の日本語訳",
  "topicTranslation": "トピックの日本語訳"
}

```json
{
  "speechTypeTranslation": "研修セッション",
  "textTranslation": "新入社員の皆さん、スターラー・プロダクションズのオリエンテーションセッションへようこそ。本日は、私たちの制作部門における基本的なワークフローについてご紹介します。まず、メディアコンテンツの制作過程を初期のブレーンストーミングから最終編集までお話しします。また、撮影セッションがどのように行われるかを理解していただくために、実際のセット見学も予定しています。さらに、効率的に高品質な成果を出す方法について、ベテラン編集者からのアドバイスもありますので、必ずメモを取りましょう。これらの知見は、今後の業務において非常に役立ちます。そして、セッションの後には質疑応答の時間を設けておりますので、疑問点がありましたらぜひその際にお尋ねください。",
  "topicTranslation": "メディア制作における新入社員向けオリエンテーションセッション"
}
```
